title: ‘This is bad’: Strategists see European oil shortages within weeks as inventories are depleted
summary_full: The Iran war oil squeeze could trigger shortages in Europe within weeks, and keep global inventories depleted until 2027, strategists warn.
summary_public: The Iran war oil squeeze could trigger shortages in Europe within weeks, and keep global inventories depleted until 2027, strategists warn.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iran war oil squeeze could trigger shortages in Europe
